case_title: RICHARD ROMANO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-27-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMANO, RICHARD INDIVIDUALLY, AND IN HIS CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE OF THE ELVIRA RAVELLA REVOCABLE TRUST, AND AS THE SOLE BENEFICARY OF THE ELVIRA RAVELLA REVOCABLE TRUST, EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF ELVIRA RAVELLA, TRUSTEE OF THE GLORIA ROMANO REVOCABLE TRUST, AND AS THE SOLE BENEFICARY OF THE GLORIA ROMANO REVOCABLE TRUST. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-15-2017 CONTINUED TO DEC-27-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100030723)
